name: Wave Life Sciences Ltd.
business: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on unlocking the broad potential of ribonucleic acid (RNA) medicines (also known as oligonucleotides), or those targeting RNA, to transform human health. Our pipeline is focused on our obesity (WVE-007), alpha-1 antitrypsin deficiency (AATD) (WVE-006) and PNPLA3 I148M liver disease (WVE-008) programs, and also includes clinical programs for Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD) and Huntington's disease (HD), as well as several preclinical programs utilizing our versatile RNA medicines platform.
sellsTo: patients with PNPLA3 I148M liver disease

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on unlocking the broad potential of ribonucleic acid (RNA) medicines (also known as oligonucleotides), or those targeting RNA, to transform human health.

In November 2019, we entered into an agreement with Asuragen (which was acquired by Bio-Techne Corporation in April 2021), a molecular diagnostics company, for the development and potential commercialization of companion diagnostics for our investigational allele-selective therapeutic programs targeting HD.

catalysts.event: Deliver six-month follow-up data from Cohort 2 (240 mg) and three-month follow-up data from Cohort 3 (400 mg) of INLIGHT clinical trial for WVE-007
catalysts.sentence: In the first quarter of 2026, we expect to deliver six-month follow-up data from Cohort 2 (240 mg) and three-month follow-up data from Cohort 3 (400 mg).

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 2a multidose portion of INLIGHT clinical trial for WVE-007
catalysts.sentence: Planning is underway to initiate the Phase 2a multidose (MAD) portion of the ongoing INLIGHT clinical trial in individuals living with higher BMI and comorbidities in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiate new clinical trials evaluating WVE-007 as an incretin add-on and as post-incretin maintenance
catalysts.sentence: We also expect to initiate new clinical trials evaluating WVE-007 as an incretin add-on and as post-incretin maintenance in 2026.

catalysts.event: Deliver data from the 400 mg multidose cohort of RestorAATion-2 for WVE-006
catalysts.sentence: We expect to deliver data from the 400 mg multidose cohort in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Deliver single and multidose data from the 600 mg cohort of RestorAATion-2 for WVE-006
catalysts.sentence: We also expect to deliver single and multidose data from the 600 mg cohort in 2026.

catalysts.event: Receive regulatory feedback on a potential accelerated approval pathway for WVE-006
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we announced we were accelerating regulatory engagement for WVE-006, and we expect to receive regulatory feedback on a potential accelerated approval pathway mid-2026.

catalysts.event: File a clinical trial application for WVE-008
catalysts.sentence: We expect to file a clinical trial application for WVE-008 in 2026.

catalysts.event: File a New Drug Application for WVE-N531 to support accelerated approval
catalysts.sentence: We plan to file a New Drug Application in 2026 to support accelerated approval of WVE-N531 with monthly dosing.

catalysts.event: Submit IND application for a potentially registrational Phase 2/3 study of WVE-003
catalysts.sentence: We have prepared an IND application for a potentially registrational Phase 2/3 study of WVE-003 and would plan to submit it in conjunction with a prospective strategic partner.

tamClaims.claim: In the United States, an estimated 42% of the adult population is living with obesity, and there are an estimated 175 million people in the United States and Europe and over one billion people globally, living with obesity.
tamClaims.sentence: In the United States, an estimated 42% of the adult population is living with obesity, and there are an estimated 175 million people in the United States and Europe and over one billion people globally, living with obesity.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 200,000 people in the United States and Europe are homozygous for the Z allele, which is the most common form of severe disease.
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 200,000 people in the United States and Europe are homozygous for the Z allele, which is the most common form of severe disease.

tamClaims.claim: There are an estimated nine million homozygous PNPLA3 I148M individuals with liver disease in the United States and Europe.
tamClaims.sentence: There are an estimated nine million homozygous PNPLA3 I148M individuals with liver disease in the United States and Europe.

tamClaims.claim: It is estimated that there are over 200,000 individuals with HD across all disease stages in the United States and Europe; ~160,000 are pre-symptomatic and ~65,000 are symptomatic.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that there are over 200,000 individuals with HD across all disease stages in the United States and Europe; ~160,000 are pre-symptomatic and ~65,000 are symptomatic.

tamClaims.claim: DMD is a rare, genetic progressive neuromuscular disorder caused by mutations in the dystrophin gene on the X chromosome that affects approximately one in 5,000 newborn boys around the world (approximately 20,000 new cases annually).
tamClaims.sentence: DMD is a rare, genetic progressive neuromuscular disorder caused by mutations in the dystrophin gene on the X chromosome that affects approximately one in 5,000 newborn boys around the world (approximately 20,000 new cases annually).
